title: InvisiBlocks
description: A mod that adds in some survival friendly invisible blocks.
body:
Invisiblocks is a simple mod that adds in a few survival friendly invisible blocks.

The invisible blocks include:

-Invisible Block

-Invisible Stairs

-Invisible Slab

-Invisible Door

-Invisible Trapdoor

-Invisible Fence

-Invisible Fence gate

The basic Invisible Block and a few of the other ones are crafted with Glass Panes.
